# Title: Amazon Renewed program policies

Title: Amazon Renewed program policies

URL Source: https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GZZVY5QX4DZHWHSW

Markdown Content:
These terms apply to your ongoing participation and application to the Amazon Renewed program.

## Apply to sell on Renewed

You must be able to meet our requirements to qualify as a seller in the Renewed program. To learn more, go to [Amazon Renewed program overview](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G201648580).

## Renewed listing requirements

For detailed guidelines on how to create Renewed product listings and detail page policies, go to [Amazon Renewed listing guide](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G202190060).

## Renewed product grades: Premium, excellent, good, and acceptable

For detailed requirements of each product condition, go to [Amazon Renewed quality](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G202190320).

**Premium condition products**: Renewed Premium represents the highest quality of product conditions sold on Amazon Renewed. Premium condition products exist on unique Renewed ASINs in the US, Canada, and Mexico stores and appear as “New” condition in your inventory. In the EU and the UK, premium condition products are listed on the standard Renewed ASIN under the “Refurbished” condition in your inventory. For more information, go to [Renewed Premium products](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GWM2EE843M45FV3R).

**Note:**Premium is available only in select Renewed stores at this time.

**Note:**Premium is available only in select Renewed stores at this time.

**Excellent condition products**: Excellent condition products appear in your inventory under “New” condition but are shown to customers as “Renewed–Excellent.” You must be an approved Renewed seller to list under excellent condition. To learn about application requirements, go to [Amazon Renewed program overview](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G201648580). To apply, go to the [Amazon Renewed application page](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/renewed/apply).

**Good and acceptable condition products**: For the Wireless and PC product categories only, you have the option to create offers on the same Renewed ASIN under two additional cosmetic conditions. If you’re an approved Renewed seller and are unable to list on these condition types, contact [Selling Partner Support](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/support/SOA).

**Note:**Good and acceptable conditions are available only in select Renewed stores at this time.

1.   Good condition: Appears in your inventory as “Used–Good” condition and is shown to customers as “Renewed–Good.”
2.   Acceptable condition: Appears in your inventory as “Used–Acceptable” condition and is shown to customers as “Renewed–Acceptable.”

## The Amazon Renewed guarantee

All Renewed products will be covered by the Amazon Renewed guarantee, and you will be responsible for any claims under the guarantee. To learn more, go to [Amazon Renewed quality](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G202190320).

## Pricing policy

Customers expect Renewed products to cost less than such products that are sold under the “New” condition. Renewed products must be priced at least 5% below **both** of the following:

*   The current “New” condition price for the same product on Amazon
*   The price of the next higher Renewed condition (for example, “Good” must be priced at least 5% below “Excellent”)

The following actions may be taken on Renewed offers that fail to meet these pricing requirements:

*   Ineligibility to be the Featured Offer on the product detail page
*   Removal from the Amazon Renewed catalog
*   Permanent loss of selling privileges for the relevant ASINs

We will send you one or more warning messages before we revoke your selling privileges for those ASINs.

## Automate Renewed pricing

The Renewed repricing rule allows you to automatically adjust prices on the Renewed SKUs in your inventory. Your price can adjust to the relevant new equivalent Featured Offer with a regular automated pricing rule.

Additionally, setting a Renewed repricing rule will raise or lower your prices in response to the new ASIN that is mapped to the Renewed version. That way, if the price of the new version of the product drops, your price will adjust to remain at least 5% lower than the corresponding Featured Offer on the new equivalent ASIN.

To set a Renewed repricing rule, follow these steps:

1.   From the drop-down menu in Seller Central, select **Pricing** and then select **Automate pricing**. Click **Create a new pricing rule**.
2.   Select the **Renewed** pricing rule type, give it a name, and choose the store where the rule will be active.
3.   Define the parameters of your pricing rule:

1.   All Renewed offers must be listed at a 5% or more discount compared with any new condition item of the same product. In the first section, you can specify to reprice your SKU by a certain amount or percentage below new condition. If there is no new ASIN mapped to your Renewed ASIN, this part of the rule will be ignored.
    2.   You can also reprice your SKU in relation to other offers that are made on the same Renewed ASIN. You can stay below, stay above, or match the Featured Offer by a certain percentage or amount.
**Note:**As you make each entry, a rule summary at the bottom will be updated with your selections.

    3.   The third section of the rule parameters will allow you to choose the types of offers and conditions that your offer prices will be compared against.
    4.   Let Amazon know whether to pause this rule when your price is updated elsewhere.
    5.   After you are you’re satisfied with how your rule is defined, click **Save this rule in Amazon**.

Once you’ve created a Renewed pricing rule, go to [Add SKUs to a pricing rule](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/201995760).

## Fees to join Amazon Renewed

There's no additional fee to join and sell on Amazon Renewed. Standard fees for selling on Amazon will apply. For more information, go to [Selling on Amazon fee schedule](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/G200336920).

## Eligible products

Unless otherwise specified in the Amazon Renewed quality policy, Renewed products must be inspected, repaired (if applicable), cleaned, and tested to ensure that they meet original manufacturer specifications.

Amazon frequently assesses product quality. To ensure a positive buyer experience, Amazon will remove any products from Amazon Renewed that can’t be repaired or refurbished, pose a hygiene or safety risk, or violate any other Amazon policies. If the performance of a Renewed product does not meet our criteria, we reserve the right to remove selling privileges for the Renewed program.

To request that a new product be approved for sale on Renewed, contact [Selling Partner Support](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/support/SOA).

The following is a list of permitted products:

1.   **Computers & Tablets**
    *   Desktop computers, laptops, tablets, notebook computers, all-in-one computers
    *   Computer components (CPUs, motherboards, graphics cards, hard drives, power supplies)
    *   Computer peripherals (monitors, keyboards, scanners, webcams, docking stations, Apple Pencil)

2.   **Mobile Devices & Wearables**

2.   **Mobile Devices & Wearables**

    *   Mobile phones, smartphones, e-book readers
    *   Mobile accessories (AirPods, Apple replacement cases, and single AirPods)
    *   Smart watches, fitness trackers, activity trackers

3.   **E-Mobility**

    *   Electric bicycles (e-bikes), electric scooters (e-scooters)

4.   **Home Entertainment**

    *   Televisions (LCD, LED, OLED, QLED), projectors
    *   Home theater systems, speakers, soundbars, subwoofers
    *   Streaming media players, cable boxes, DVD/Blu-ray players

5.   **Audio Equipment**

    *   Headphones, earbuds, headsets (gaming, wireless, Bluetooth)
    *   Microphones, DJ equipment, mixers, turntables
    *   Amplifiers, receivers, audio interfaces

6.   **Cameras & Video**

    *   Digital cameras, DSLR, mirrorless, camcorders, action cameras
    *   Camera lenses, gimbals, stabilizers
    *   Surveillance cameras, security systems, baby monitors, video doorbells

7.   **Musical Instruments**

7.   **Musical Instruments**

    *   Guitars (electric, acoustic, bass), instrument amplifiers
    *   Keyboards, pianos, synthesizers, drums and percussion
    *   Wind instruments (saxophones, trumpets, clarinets, flutes, trombones)
    *   String instruments (violins, cellos, basses)

8.   **Kitchen Appliances**

    *   Coffee makers, espresso machines, blenders, food processors, mixers, juicers
    *   Microwave ovens, toaster ovens, toasters
    *   Slow cookers, pressure cookers, rice cookers, air fryers
    *   Specialty appliances (waffle makers, pasta makers, ice cream makers)

9.   **Major Appliances**

    *   Refrigerators, freezers, wine cellars, beverage coolers, under-sink water filtration systems
    *   Ovens, ranges, stoves, cooktops, dishwashers

10.   **Cleaning Appliances**

    *   Vacuums (upright, canister, handheld, robotic, wet-dry, stick)
    *   Steam cleaners, carpet cleaners, floor buffers

11.   **Heating & Cooling**

11.   **Heating & Cooling**

    *   Air conditioners (portable, window, split-system)
    *   Space heaters (electric, gas, propane, kerosene)
    *   Fans (ceiling, tower, pedestal), humidifiers, dehumidifiers, air purifiers

12.   **Lawn & Garden**

    *   Lawn mowers (riding, walk-behind, robotic)
    *   String trimmers, edgers, leaf blowers, snow blowers
    *   Pressure washers, irrigation systems, lawn tractors

13.   **Power Tools**

    *   Drills, drivers, impact wrenches
    *   Saws (circular, miter, table, chain, jig, reciprocating)
    *   Sanders, grinders, polishers, nailers, staplers
    *   Routers, planers, lathes, welding equipment, generators, air compressors

14.   **Automotive Parts & Accessories**

    *   Engine components (alternators, starters, fuel pumps, turbochargers)
    *   Brake systems (calipers, rotors, master cylinders)
    *   GPS navigation, car audio (receivers, speakers, amplifiers)
    *   Backup cameras, dash cams

15.   **Networking & Connectivity**

    *   Routers, modems, mesh Wi-Fi systems
    *   Network switches, hubs, access points, adapters, repeaters, extenders

16.   **Office Equipment**

    *   Printers (inkjet, laser, photo, thermal), scanners (document, flatbed)
    *   Copiers, fax machines, cash registers, credit card readers
    *   Calculators, paper shredders, laminators

17.   **Gaming**

    *   Video game consoles, VR headsets
    *   Gaming controllers (gamepads, racing wheels, joysticks, flight controllers)
    *   Gaming headsets, keyboards, mice

18.   **Personal Care**

    *   Hair care (dryers, straighteners, curling irons)
    *   Shavers and trimmers (electric razors, beard trimmers)
    *   Electric toothbrushes, massagers, bathroom scales

19.   **Fitness & Sports Equipment**

    *   Exercise bikes, treadmills, ellipticals, rowers
    *   Fitness trackers, heart rate monitors, pedometers
    *   Golf club sets

20.   **GPS & Navigation**

20.   **GPS & Navigation**

    *   Portable GPS units, vehicle GPS, marine GPS, fish finders
    *   Aviation GPS, sports GPS (cycling, running, golf), GPS trackers

21.   **Communication Devices**

    *   Landline telephones (corded, cordless), answering machines
    *   Two-way radios, CB radios, walkie-talkies, VoIP phones

22.   **Smart Home & Security**

    *   Smart home controllers, smart speakers, smart thermostats
    *   Door locks, access control, motion detectors, alarm systems
    *   Video doorbells, security cameras

23.   **Measuring & Testing Tools**

    *   Measuring tools (tape measures, laser distance meters, levels)
    *   Multimeters, voltage testers, moisture meters, thermal imagers
    *   Stud finders, metal detectors, rangefinders

24.   **Marine & Powersports**

    *   Marine electronics (GPS, radar, fish finders), marine audio
    *   Trolling motors, powersports GPS and audio

25.   **Commercial Equipment**

25.   **Commercial Equipment**

    *   Commercial kitchen equipment (ovens, grills, fryers, refrigerators)
    *   Commercial food preparation (mixers, slicers, processors)
    *   3D printers, commercial access control systems

26.   **Miscellaneous Electronics**

    *   Digital picture frames, weather stations, weather radios
    *   Drones, remote-control quadcopters, karaoke systems, solar panels
